chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item on a sales order that specifies the product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price at the time of purchase.
synonyms: A single line within a Sales Order
Individual product lines within a sales order
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category(Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID is the primary key column of the TB_PRODUCT table that uniquely identifies a product and is referenced by order lines (ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference] | **Foreign Keys**:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual line item on a Sales Order that specifies a product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | **Business Rules**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:

- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction that references exactly one Sales Order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Payment Relationships**:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is a business entity representing a unit of order fulfillment associated with exactly one Sales Order and originating from exactly one Warehouse; a Sales Order may have one or more Shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | **Sales Order Relationships**:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Is Active
entities_post_resolution.definition: A boolean attribute that indicates whether the entity (such as a customer) is active and allowed to perform actions like placing orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: Customer master data entity representing customers, identified by the CUST_ID key and storing their core attributes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer Address is the address record associated with a customer used for shipment and order fulfillment in the e-commerce domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | # Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Related Concepts**: CustomerAddress,

entities_post_resolution.name: Unique Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique email address used as the login credential for a user in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login)

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A monetary reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price that applied at the moment the order was placed (historical price), not the current base currency unit price.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)

entities_post_resolution.name: Varchar(150)
entities_post_resolution.definition: Geographic region code used for tax purposes.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact information, regional assignment, and status, representing the master data for customers.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, product details, category association, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category data for products, including each category's name and its parent category to define a category tree.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header-level information for customer sales orders, including identifiers, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation time, delivery time, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the line items for customer orders, including which product, the quantity, unit price, and line total amount for each order.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments linked to customer orders, including payment method, amount, status, and timestamps for creation and confirmation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of individual shipments, linking each shipment to its order, the warehouse it originated from, shipment timestamp, tracking information, and current status.
